subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached Us and been illumined by the lights of the Most Great Countenance. We hearkened unto thy call and beheld thy mention. Verily [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت حاضر و بانوار منظر اکبر فائز ندایت اصغا شد و ذکرت مشاهده گشت انا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
